Zhang Niujiao [Oxhorn Zhang] 張牛角
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Niujiao [Oxhorn Zhang] (張牛角). Bandit leader. After his death from a flying dart, command of his force passed to Zhang Yan. Zhang Niujiao [Oxhorn Zhang] was a bandit
